tools.name: list_upcoming_events
tools.title: List upcoming events
tools.description: List published, public upcoming events at Princess Pink (id, title, venue, starts_at, ticket price in cents). Use this to find event IDs for other tools.

limit.description: Maximum number of events to return (1-50).

tools.name: get_event_details
tools.title: Get event details
tools.description: Fetch the full public details for a single event by id: description, schedule (starts_at / ends_at), house rules (dress_code, theme, waiver_text), and venue info (venue_name, address, city, capacity). Returns not-found if the event is private, unpublished, or does not exist.

event_id.description: The UUID of the event to fetch.

tools.name: list_my_rsvps
tools.title: List my RSVPs
tools.description: List the signed-in user's RSVPs (event_id, status, entry_code, entry_phrase, guest_count, check-in state). Runs under RLS as that user.

upcomingOnly.description: When true, only return RSVPs for events that haven't started yet.

tools.name: list_my_memberships
tools.title: List my memberships
tools.description: List the signed-in user's memberships and passes (kind, environment, expires_at, revoked/suspended state). Read-only. Runs under RLS as that user.

tools.name: create_rsvp
tools.title: Create RSVP
tools.description: Create an RSVP for a specific event as the signed-in user, and return the RSVP's entry code and current check-in status. Runs under RLS as that user.

eventId.description: The event's UUID to RSVP to.

guestCount.description: Number of attendees on this RSVP, including the user (1-10).

tools.name: cancel_rsvp
tools.title: Cancel RSVP
tools.description: Cancel the signed-in user's RSVP for a specific event (deletes the RSVP row) and confirm the updated state. Runs under RLS as that user.

eventId.description: The event's UUID whose RSVP should be cancelled.

tools.name: check_in_to_event
tools.title: Check in to event
tools.description: Check the signed-in user in to their RSVP using its entry code (e.g. `PINK-123`). Returns whether check-in succeeded and the check-in timestamp. Idempotent — re-running on an already checked-in RSVP returns the existing timestamp.

entry_code.description: The RSVP's entry code, e.g. `PINK-123`. Case-insensitive.
